agents.prompt:
Wire i18n translations into ConversationListScreen.tsx and ChatScreen.tsx.

ConversationListScreen.tsx at: /Users/bujin/Documents/Projects/BadmintonGroup/frontend/BadmintonGroup/src/screens/ConversationListScreen.tsx
ChatScreen.tsx at: /Users/bujin/Documents/Projects/BadmintonGroup/frontend/BadmintonGroup/src/screens/ChatScreen.tsx

For EACH file:
1. Read the file
2. Add `import { useTranslation } from '../i18n/LanguageContext';` near imports
3. Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at top of component
4. Replace hardcoded strings with t.messages.* and t.common.* keys:

ConversationListScreen:
- "Messages" → t.messages.title
- "Search conversations..." → t.messages.search
- "No messages yet" → t.messages.noMessages
- "New Message" → t.messages.newMessage
- "Loading conversations..." → t.common.loading
- "Error"/"Failed to load" → t.common.error
- "Delete"/"Cancel" → t.common.delete / t.common.cancel

ChatScreen:
- "Chat" → dynamic (set via navigation.setOptions)
- "Loading messages..." → t.common.loading
- "No messages yet" → t.messages.noMessages
- "Say hello!" → t.messages.sayHello
- "Connecting..." → t.messages.connecting
- "Today"/"Yesterday" → t.messages.today / t.messages.yesterday
- "Error"/"Failed to load" → t.common.error
- "typing..." → t.messages.typing

5. Use edit_file for changes
6. Verify no broken JSX

agents.prompt:
Wire i18n translations into CreateSessionScreen.tsx at /Users/bujin/Documents/Projects/BadmintonGroup/frontend/BadmintonGroup/src/screens/CreateSessionScreen.tsx

Steps:
1. Read the file
2. Add `import { useTranslation } from '../i18n/LanguageContext';` near the other imports
3. Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the top of the component function
4. Replace hardcoded English strings with t.* keys from these sections of translations.ts:
   - t.common.appName, t.common.save, t.common.cancel
   - t.session.create, t.session.name, t.session.location, t.session.dateTime, t.session.maxPlayers, t.session.skillLevel, t.session.description
   - Any other obvious hardcoded strings → map to the closest t.session.* or t.common.* key
5. Use edit_file tool to make changes
6. Verify the file still makes sense (no broken JSX)

The translations file is at: frontend/BadmintonGroup/src/i18n/translations.ts (read if needed for exact keys)
Key = t.session.name → "Session Name" (en) / "活动名称" (zh)

agents.prompt:
Wire i18n translations into UserProfileScreen.tsx and FriendsListScreen.tsx.

UserProfileScreen.tsx at: /Users/bujin/Documents/Projects/BadmintonGroup/frontend/BadmintonGroup/src/screens/UserProfileScreen.tsx
FriendsListScreen.tsx at: /Users/bujin/Documents/Projects/BadmintonGroup/frontend/BadmintonGroup/src/screens/FriendsListScreen.tsx

For EACH file:
1. Read the file
2. Add `import { useTranslation } from '../i18n/LanguageContext';` near imports
3. Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at top of component
4. Replace hardcoded strings with appropriate t.* keys:

UserProfileScreen → t.profile.* keys:
- "Profile"/"My Profile" → t.profile.title
- "Edit Profile" → t.profile.edit
- "Settings" → t.profile.settings
- "Statistics"/"Stats" → t.profile.stats
- "Total Sessions" → t.profile.totalSessions
- "Games Played" → t.profile.gamesPlayed
- "Wins" → t.profile.wins
- "Losses" → t.profile.losses
- "Win Rate" → t.profile.winRate
- "Loading..." → t.common.loading

FriendsListScreen → t.friends.* keys:
- "Friends" → t.friends.title
- "Add Friend" → t.friends.add
- "Remove"/"Remove Friend" → t.friends.remove
- "Block" → t.friends.block
- "Search players..." → t.friends.search
- "No friends yet" → t.friends.noFriends
- "Friend Requests" → t.friends.requests

5. Use edit_file for changes
6. Verify no broken JSX
